businessPurpose: Produce a tightly scoped control-total report of PLACEHOLDER_AMOUNT_KF by PLACEHOLDER_GROUP_CHAR for one period and entity, so the total can be reconciled against the source ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: The grand total of PLACEHOLDER_AMOUNT_KF equals the approved control total for the period and entity.
Subtotals by PLACEHOLDER_GROUP_CHAR reconcile line by line to the source ledger.
Zero-balance rows stay visible: no display setting removes rows that a reconciliation must account for.
